name: job-agent
description: Autonomous LinkedIn job application agent powered by AI and MCP

scripts.build: npm run build -w packages/core && npm run build -w packages/cv-parser && npm run build -w packages/linkedin-mcp && npm run build -w packages/job-search && npm run build -w packages/ats-apply && npm run build -w packages/reporter && npm run build -w packages/api && npm run build -w apps/cli
scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev -w packages/core" "npm run dev -w packages/cv-parser" "npm run dev -w packages/linkedin-mcp" "npm run dev -w packages/job-search" "npm run dev -w packages/api" "npm run dev -w @job-agent/user-service"
scripts.dev:services: npm run build -w packages/core && concurrently "npm run dev -w packages/api" "npm run dev -w @job-agent/api"
scripts.typecheck: npm run build -w packages/core && npm run build -w packages/cv-parser && npm run build -w packages/linkedin-mcp && npm run build -w packages/job-search && npm run build -w packages/ats-apply && npm run build -w packages/reporter && tsc --noEmit -p packages/api/tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit -p apps/cli/tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit -p apps/microservices/user-service/tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit -p apps/api/tsconfig.json
scripts.test: echo 'No tests yet — add Vitest/Jest test suites to enable this gate' && exit 0
